title: Creating a Natural Language Understanding Model
scenario: Develop a natural language understanding (NLU) model that can analyze and classify patient complaints into predefined categories. The prompt should include a detailed description of the model architecture, training data, and evaluation metrics.
constraints: Must be implemented using a transformer-based architecture
Must use a minimum of 3 distinct neural network layers

evaluationCriteria.description: Checks if the generated JSON adheres to all constraints.
Evaluates the effectiveness and feasibility of the model architecture.
Verifies the relevance and quality of training data.
Checks the appropriateness and comprehensiveness of evaluation metrics.
